resources.string: Do you want to log this device out from your account?
Logging out of device makes that device not able to receive new messages. App may still store old messages. Device will be logged out as soon as it comes online
Do you also want to clear messages from device?
This action cannot be undone and messages will be lost permanently
You can always unblock by going to your profile and clicking the user name in blocklist section
Messages will be lost forever. This action cannot be undone
Do you want to delete message history of user %1$s?
